productDisplayName: Woodland Men Camel Brown Casual Shoes
description: woodland, a giant in the outdoor shoe industry, have come up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance. Stylish overlays on the woodsy upper add an aesthetic referenced from the great outdoors. Crafted with hand-picked Italian leather and soles finished with German technology, your footwear closet is incomplete without a Woodland shoe. Wear this with chinos or denims and a checked casual shirt or a tee and style your outfit with a rugged belt. Upper Leather upper with strategically placed overlays Central lace ups Padded tongue and collar with branding at the back of the collar Padded insole for in-step comfort Removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic Midsole Rubber midsole Outsole Dual density TPU outsole with multidirectional lugs for grip and traction and a curved midfoot Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
